# Max packet size

**Data field**

A 32-bit integer indicating the packet size limit, in bytes, used when creating this hint track.

## Overview

The largest packet generated by this hint track will be no larger than this limit.

## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit integer specifying the size of this sample description in bytes.
- **Data format**: A four-character code indicating the data format of the hint track samples.
- **Reserved**: Six bytes.
- **Data reference index**: A field that indirectly specifies where to find the hint track sample data.
- **Hint track version**: A 16-bit unsigned integer indicating the version of the hint track specification.
- **Last compatible hint track version**: A 16-bit unsigned integer indicating the oldest hint track version with which this hint track is backward-compatible.
- **Additional data table**: A table of variable length containing additional information.
